title: Question UI renderer with fallback to simple text input
purpose: Renders complex UI structures from AI-generated question definitions or falls back to a simple text input when the UI is invalid or missing. Handles loading states and action callbacks.
module_context: Exports a QuestionRenderer component that accepts a question object, action callback, and loading state. Includes a SimpleTextQuestion fallback component for basic text inputs. Uses AIUIRenderer for rendering structured UI components.

methods.name: SimpleTextQuestion
methods.normalized_params: ({ text, isLoading, onSubmit }: { text: string; isLoading?: boolean; onSubmit?: () => void }): React.FC<{ text: string; isLoading?: boolean; onSubmit?: () => void }>

steps.content: Display the question text within a prose formatted paragraph.
Provide a textarea for user response input with disabled state during loading.
Include a submit button that triggers the provided onSubmit handler when valid input is present.
Disable the submit button when input is empty or during loading.
Create a UI component definition from the question text, attempting to parse JSON if it starts with '{'.
IF JSON parsing fails, fallback to creating a Card component with Markdown child containing the question text.
Validate that the UI component type is registered in the AI UI registry.
IF the component is not valid, render the SimpleTextQuestion fallback with the original question text.
ELSE render the AIUIRenderer with the validated UI component and wrapped action handler.
Apply disabled state and reduced opacity to the renderer during loading.
Prevent action execution if the component is currently in a loading state.
Execute the provided action callback with the action ID and payload.
